context: Gateway restart at 00:28 UTC showed health check failure but gateway was actually running (listening on ws:// logged 1s before the error). All subsequent crons succeeded. New gene distinguishes benign race condition from real restart failures (covered by gene_gateway_restart_blocked_by_plugin).

Main session failed 4x trying to update dev-mgr patrol cron job: used internal jobs.json format (message/id/model-in-payload) instead of tool API format (text/jobId). New gene documents the schema difference + capsule with correct format and fallback strategy (edit jobs.json directly).

Dev-mgr patrol at 05:14 UTC hit message failed: Action send requires a target — error text did not match gene trigger (which only had target required). Widened trigger to include this variant. Also improved strategy: when target unavailable in cron/subagent, use sessions_send relay instead of message.send.

Brave Search 429 at 03:31 UTC — Free plan 1req/s rate limit hit during concurrent browsing. Noted in PCEC #21/#22 but not addressed. New gene with fallback strategy: web_fetch as backup, stagger concurrent calls, monitor quota.

System clean — all errors covered by existing genes, no new patterns. Updated SKILL.md v0.3.0→v0.4.0: added Idle Period Protocol (skip as valid outcome with events.jsonl logging), cost awareness section, optional idle-period work list, raised stagnation breaker threshold to 3 consecutive skips. Prevents forced low-value changes in calm periods.
New day (Feb 24), no gateway log yet, no cron errors, no new session errors. All yesterday signals covered. First skip under v0.4.0 protocol.
No gateway log for Feb 24 yet, no cron errors, same sessions. Consecutive skip 2/3.

Proactive pruning of events.jsonl: archived 12 older events (evt_001–evt_012, Feb 21–22 era) to events-archive.jsonl. Main file reduced from 19 to 8 entries. Prevents hitting ~30 line threshold. Resets consecutive skip counter.

Discovered recurring auto-repair pattern: 11 occurrences across 6 sessions (Feb 3–24). Gateway inserts synthetic error results when tool calls have no matching result (caused by restarts/timeouts). Clusters on Feb 23 correlate with LLM cascade failure at 03:47–03:58 UTC. New gene catalogs this auto-healing mechanism.

3 stream_read_error events (02:59, 03:01, 03:28 UTC) — new failure mode where LLM SSE stream breaks mid-response. Distinct from timeout (no response) and 502 (error response). Widened gene trigger and strategy to cover all three provider failure modes. Today also saw gateway restart timeout (02:02) + LLM timeouts (03:41) — full instability sequence now documented.

All 6 gateway errors today match existing genes (429, restart timeout, LLM timeout, web_fetch 404s operational). No cron failures. No new session errors. 16 genes, 10 events — healthy state. Consecutive skip 1/3.

All 6 gateway errors today match existing genes: Brave 429 (gene_web_search_rate_limit), web_fetch 404s (operational), gateway restart timeout (gene_gateway_restart_health_race), LLM timeouts (gene_llm_provider_cascade_failure). No cron failures. No new session errors. 16 genes, 11 events. OpenClaw upgraded to 2026.2.22-2 — no new error patterns observed post-upgrade. Consecutive skip 2/3.

Stagnation preemption (2/3 consecutive skips). Audited cc-iterator against OpenClaw 2026.2.22-2 upgrade: added wake event failure handling (cross-ref gene_subagent_announce_timeout), /verbose debugging note, background timeout removal, execution/delivery status split. v0.1.2→v0.1.3.

ENOENT for coding-agent SKILL.md at /root/.nvm/versions/node/v24.13.0/ — path doesn't exist (NVM fully removed), OpenClaw installed at /usr/lib/node_modules/openclaw/. System prompt still injects defunct NVM paths for all built-in and extension skills. Co-occurring: 'Invalid config' warnings for feishu/telegram/memory-core plugins. Root cause: gateway restart during migration picked up cached or incorrect skill resolution paths. New gene covers the full diagnosis and fix sequence for post-migration stale paths.

Clean idle period. No gateway log for today (06:48 CST). Yesterday errors all covered: stale NVM paths (gene #17), Brave 429 (gene #15), config warnings (gene #17). PCEC #25 stream_read_error recovered by #26. Stale paths fix (gateway restart) deferred to human — wakes at 07:00. 17 genes, 15 events. Consecutive skip 1/3.

Clean idle. 2x web_fetch transient failures (23:00 UTC) — generic network errors, not actionable/gene-worthy. No cron failures. Stale NVM paths still present, covered by gene #17 (awaiting human gateway restart). 17 genes, 16 events. Consecutive skip 2/3.

New config validation ERROR: channels.discord.guilds expected record, received array (02:07 UTC). Occurred during OpenClaw 2026.2.23 upgrade transition. Gateway started with fallback but discord guild settings were degraded. Config later fixed. No existing gene covered config schema validation failures — gene_stale_skill_paths only mentioned config warnings as a related signal (point 6), not hard validation errors. New gene covers diagnosis, fix, and prevention for Zod-style config type mismatches after upgrades. 18 genes total.

Two DiscordMessageListener 30s timeouts (07:28+07:42 UTC) during heavy multi-agent setup work (creating dev-engineer, review-engineer agents, Discord bindings, cron jobs). Session contention caused incoming Discord messages to queue behind complex tool sequences. No existing gene covered EventQueue listener timeouts. New gene documents the 30s timeout mechanism, distinguishes session-contention from LLM-slowness, and provides mitigation guidance (workload isolation, lighter models). 19 genes total.

6x components.blocks type errors (09:11-09:12 UTC) — agent sent Discord Components v2 with unsupported block types, causing message delivery failures. Also bundled 3 related Discord entity resolution errors (Unknown Message x2, Unknown Emoji x2, guildId required x1) into same gene as they share the common theme of invalid Discord API references. All occurred during multi-agent setup session. New gene documents valid v2 block types and common mistakes. 20 genes total.
